adapter_fields.finding: The source context is real but already contains the fixed theory and comparison frame.
adapter_fields.value: fixed gravitational QFT, observer algebra, dressing, and boundary context

adapter_fields.finding: The predicate is supplied by the observer frame, modular-flow choice, dressing, constraint handling, regulator, or algebraic completion, not generated as a new source-side law.
adapter_fields.value: trace/type/admissibility predicate over a chosen crossed-product or observer algebra

adapter_fields.finding: The candidate has a concrete before/after algebraic signal.
adapter_fields.value: algebra-type, trace, or observer-subalgebra transition signal

adapter_fields.finding: The witness can be preserved without granting source issuance.
adapter_fields.value: preserved entropy, charge, correlation, modular, or boundary diagnostic

adapter_fields.finding: The successor context is a represented or completed view of the fixed theory rather than a source-owned algebra transition.
adapter_fields.value: same fixed theory viewed through crossed-product, observer, or boundary completion

adapter_fields.finding: Record preservation is available and is not the blocking field.
adapter_fields.value: preserved algebra-comparison record and observer-frame trace

exact_missing_source_object.also_required: A W4 perturbation non-factorization certificate under the same preserved observer, boundary, charge, entropy, and correlation records.
exact_missing_source_object.required: A native physical source law in which gravitational dynamics forms a new observable, instrument, or admissibility algebra that is not representable by a fixed global theory, observer algebra, crossed-product or modular-flow construction, boundary condition, gauge/dressing convention, regulator, or completed history.

fixed_source_rival.reason: The algebraic change is reproduced by a fixed gravitational or QFT source plus observer frame, dressing, crossed-product or modular-flow construction, boundary/constraint data, and preserved comparison records.

next_required_test: another non-overlapping physical candidate with a source-owned transition law, or a bounded no-go target for observer-algebra bookkeeping candidates that avoids universal physical overclaim

witness_gates.finding: A changed algebraic presentation or trace can appear, but it is not shown to create a non-isomorphic source algebra rather than a crossed-product, observer, modular, or boundary representation of the fixed theory.
The admissibility predicate is chosen by the observer algebra, constraint implementation, dressing, regulator, or comparison construction.
The construction space is the fixed theory plus an algebraic completion recipe, not a source-generated construction grammar.
Perturbations still factor through reference-frame choice, boundary data, gauge/dressing convention, modular flow, regulator, or completed-history description.
Entropy, charge, algebraic, and boundary records can be preserved.
Observer-access, gauge/relabeling, crossed-product, and completed-history absorbers are not defeated.
